caption: A person's hands, wearing a white smartwatch, are shown working on a crafting project on a white surface. The person holds a card featuring a brick-patterned background and a green leaf-patterned square piece of paper. As the sequence progresses, the person carefully positions the leaf-patterned square onto the card, gradually aligning it and pressing it down. In the background, various crafting supplies are visible, including a light-blue tool and a red object. On-screen text across the bottom reads "BLOOM WHERE YOU'RE PLANTED 12" X 12" DESIGNER SERIES PAPER," and a logo for "Stamping" is visible in the lower-left corner. The card itself has text that reads "Wishing you a BIRTHDAY filled with all the best things." The focus remains on the manual process of assembling the decorative card components.
